prestazioni: Engine swap to J37A4 (3.7L V6 from Acura RL) with forged internals (JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL Race Series bearings) and a custom 3.8L stroker kit (Crower crankshaft, 92mm bore) for 420whp on E85 with a custom Hondata KPro V4 ECU tune

Full bolt-on forced induction using a Garrett GTX3582R turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) with a custom top-mount intercooler (GReddy Type-RS 450mm core), HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust (Burns Stainless 4-2-1 headers, MagnaFlow 76mm mufflers)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for JDM Inspire UC1 chassis), Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow), and a full polybush kit (Energy Suspension Hyper-Flex for UC1 subframe and control arms) paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (UC1-specific fenders, custom carbon fiber overfenders, and extended side skirts) with a custom front splitter (Seibon carbon fiber, 3-inch overhang) and a custom GT wing (Voltex Type-7, 65-inch span, 3D-printed mounts for UC1 trunk)

Custom JDM-spec Inspire front bumper lip (replica of 2003 Honda Inspire UC1 Type-S Aero bumper) with integrated DRLs (Morimoto XB LED pods) and a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 30% weight reduction, functional vents for turbo clearance)

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (UC1-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000, 6-point, bolt-in with gusseted rear strut tower mounts) wrapped in Alcantara (Stitch-It Customs, Honda Racing Blue stitching)
